title: PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: SUNNYSIDE HEALTH CENTER PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary medical care for adults and children such as general physicals, vaccinations, treatment of acute and chronic illness, prenatal care, substance use assessment, and health education. Also assists in applying for the Oregon Health Plan and private insurances on the Federal Health Exchange. 9775 SE Sunnyside Road Suite 200 Clackamas, OR 97015 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-7pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 655-8471 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 655-8471 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment. FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured and underinsured patients. Minimum $20 fee due at time of medical appointment for uninsured patients. No one is refused care due to an inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus line 155, 156, and near Clackamas Town Center Transit Center and stop location 11453, 11454. Max stop Green - End of Line 13132 Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Childhood Immunization General Medical Care Navigator Programs Prenatal Care Public Clinics Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - FREE HIV AND SYPHILIS TESTING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SUNNYSIDE HEALTH CENTER
